case_title: NORTHSTAR EDUCATION FINANCE, INC. VS. ABBEY L. KENNEDY et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $300.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT KENNEDY, ABBEY L.
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, (TRANSACTION ID # 18018015) FILED BY PLAINTIFF NORTHSTAR EDUCATION FINANCE, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT KENNEDY, ABBEY L.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO EVIDENCE CODE SECTION 1551 FILED BY PLAINTIFF NORTHSTAR EDUCATION FINANCE, INC.
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF NORTHSTAR EDUCATION FINANCE, INC.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NORTHSTAR EDUCATION FINANCE, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT KENNEDY, ABBEY L. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-13-2012
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF NORTHSTAR EDUCATION FINANCE, INC. SERVED MAY-28-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KENNEDY, ABBEY L.

EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT KENNEDY, ABBEY L.
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF REQUEST FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF NORTHSTAR EDUCATION FINANCE, INC.

DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NORTHSTAR EDUCATION FINANCE, INC.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NORTHSTAR EDUCATION FINANCE, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KENNEDY, ABBEY L. $9,728.53 PRINCIPAL, $1,300.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $165.87 INTEREST, $300.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,494.40, SEE SCANNED DOC
